title: Open work permit for prospective Provincial Nominee Program candidates with a support letter from Manitoba or Yukon - After you apply - Canada.ca
content:
## If you applied for an open work permit only
You can keep working under the same conditions as your original work permit while you wait for a decision on your open work permit application. This is called maintained status .
If we approve your open work permit application, we’ll mail the work permit to the Canadian address you gave us.

## If you applied for an open work permit and for restoration
You can stay in Canada while we make a decision on your application but you can’t work until your new work permit has been issued.
